name: token-coach
description: Reads GitHub Copilot's local debug logs and coaches you toward cheaper token usage by surfacing cost (NanoAiu) and cache hit rates.

commands.title: Token Coach: Check GitHub credit usage (this month)

tokenCoach.costWarnThreshold.markdownDescription: Flag any request whose cost (in `copilotUsageNanoAiu`) exceeds this value. Default `3000000000` (= 3 AIU).

tokenCoach.inputWarnThreshold.markdownDescription: Flag any request whose `inputTokens` exceed this value. Default `50000`.

tokenCoach.lowCacheRateThreshold.markdownDescription: Flag requests whose cache hit rate (`cachedTokens / inputTokens`) is below this value (only when input is also large — see `lowCacheMinInputTokens`). Default `0.5`.

tokenCoach.lowCacheMinInputTokens.markdownDescription: Minimum `inputTokens` before the low-cache-hit rule fires. Avoids nagging on tiny requests. Default `20000`.

tokenCoach.ioRatioThreshold.markdownDescription: Flag requests where `inputTokens / outputTokens` exceeds this value (huge input, tiny output). Default `1000`.

tokenCoach.ioMinInputTokens.markdownDescription: Minimum `inputTokens` before the tiny-output rule fires, so small side-calls (e.g. a 2-token reply on 2K input) aren't mislabelled as 'huge input'. Default `10000`.

tokenCoach.attachmentShareWarn.markdownDescription: Flag a message when open/attached files make up more than this share of its **logged** context (Copilot only itemizes context on the first turn; the system prompt and cached history aren't included). Default `0.4` (40%).

tokenCoach.slowToolWarnMs.markdownDescription: Flag a message when a single tool consumes more than this many milliseconds (summed across calls). Default `10000` (10s).

tokenCoach.cacheIdleMinutes.markdownDescription: Idle minutes after which the prompt cache is assumed to have expired. If a mid-chat message arrives after a longer pause **and** its cache reuse actually dropped, it's flagged as `cache-expired-idle`. The Claude (Anthropic) cache TTL is ~5 min (sliding); OpenAI's is ~5–10 min. Set `0` to disable idle detection.

tokenCoach.usdPerAiu.markdownDescription: US dollars per 1 AIU. GitHub's June 2026 usage-based billing prices **1 AI credit = $0.01**, and 1 AIU ≈ 1 AI credit, so the default is `0.01`. Set to `0` to hide dollar estimates.

tokenCoach.planMonthlyUsd.markdownDescription: Your monthly Copilot plan price per user (Copilot **Business = $19**, **Enterprise / Pro+ = $39**). Used only to tint the status bar when this month's spend gets large; the dashboard shows what you used, not a quota.

tokenCoach.notifyOnExpensiveRequest.markdownDescription: Show a notification when a newly logged request exceeds the cost threshold.

tokenCoach.notifyOnInefficiency.markdownDescription: Show a gentle, throttled nudge when a new message shows an actionable inefficiency (cache went cold mid-chat, or open/attached files dominate context). At most one nudge every 5 minutes.

tokenCoach.pollIntervalSeconds.markdownDescription: Backup polling interval (seconds) used in addition to the file watcher. Set to `0` to disable polling and rely on the watcher only.

tokenCoach.workspaceStoragePathOverride.markdownDescription: Optional absolute path to a `workspaceStorage` directory. Useful for testing or non-standard installs. Leave empty to auto-detect the standard per-OS locations.

tokenCoach.githubToken.markdownDescription: Fine-grained GitHub Personal Access Token with billing read access (the **Plan** account permission for personal usage, or **org billing read** if your seat is org-managed — see `tokenCoach.githubOrg`). Used by *Token Coach: Check GitHub credit usage* to read (read-only) your real Copilot credit consumption. Stored locally in your settings; used only when you run that command. Leave empty to be prompted.

tokenCoach.githubUsername.markdownDescription: Optional GitHub username for the billing lookup. Leave empty to derive it from the token automatically.

tokenCoach.githubOrg.markdownDescription: Organization login to read billing from when your Copilot seat is **billed through an org** (Copilot Business/Enterprise). GitHub's per-user billing endpoints can't see org-managed usage, so set this to hit `GET /organizations/{org}/settings/billing/usage` instead. Requires a token with org billing read access. Leave empty for personal (user-level) billing.
